---
title: "Chess Insights Dashboard"
subtitle: "Automated chess analytics for kaczor594"
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "functions.R"))
con <- get_site_db()
player_moves <- load_site_player_moves(con)
games <- load_site_games(con)
stats <- get_db_stats(con)
```

## Overview

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.stat-card}
[`r stats$analyzed_games`]{.stat-value}

[Analyzed Games]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.stat-card}
[`r sprintf("%.1f%%", mean(calculate_accuracy(player_moves$centipawn_loss[player_moves$is_player_move & !is.na(player_moves$centipawn_loss)])))`]{.stat-value}

[Avg Accuracy]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.stat-card}
[`r format(min(games$date_played, na.rm = TRUE), "%b %Y")` — `r format(max(games$date_played, na.rm = TRUE), "%b %Y")`]{.stat-value .stat-value-small style="font-size: 1.2rem;"}

[Date Range]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.stat-card}
[`r games %>% count(time_control) %>% slice_max(n, n = 1) %>% pull(time_control)`]{.stat-value .stat-value-small style="font-size: 1.2rem;"}

[Most Played]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

:::

## Recent Performance

```{r recent-performance}
acc_trend <- calculate_accuracy_trend(player_moves, window_size = 10)

last_20 <- acc_trend %>% tail(20)

plot_ly(last_20, x = ~game_num, y = ~accuracy, type = "scatter", mode = "markers+lines",
        marker = list(size = 8, color = "#f0d9b5"),
        line = list(color = "#2E86AB"),
        hovertemplate = "Game %{x}<br>Accuracy: %{y:.1f}%<extra></extra>") %>%
  add_trace(y = ~rolling_accuracy, mode = "lines",
            line = list(color = "#b58863", width = 3, dash = "dot"),
            name = "Rolling Avg",
            hovertemplate = "Rolling Avg: %{y:.1f}%<extra></extra>") %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Last 20 Games — Accuracy", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Game Number", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Accuracy (%)", range = c(0, 100), gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd"),
    showlegend = FALSE
  )
```

## Move Quality Distribution

```{r move-quality}
move_dist <- calculate_move_distribution(player_moves %>% filter(is_player_move))

move_colors <- c(
  "Best" = "#4CAF50", "Excellent" = "#8BC34A", "Good" = "#CDDC39",
  "Inaccuracy" = "#FFC107", "Mistake" = "#FF9800", "Blunder" = "#F44336", "Unknown" = "#9E9E9E"
)

plot_ly(move_dist, labels = ~move_quality, values = ~n, type = "pie",
        hole = 0.5,
        marker = list(colors = move_colors[move_dist$move_quality]),
        textinfo = "label+percent",
        hovertemplate = "%{label}: %{value} moves (%{percent})<extra></extra>") %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Move Quality Breakdown", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd"),
    showlegend = FALSE
  )
```

## Rating vs Accuracy

```{r rating-accuracy}
p <- plot_rating_accuracy(acc_trend)
ggplotly(p) %>%
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd")
  )
```

```{r cleanup}
disconnect_db(con)
```
